response:
# Cheaper Alternatives to BambooHR

## Budget-Friendly Options

**Guidepoint** ($39-99/user/month)
- Strong employee data management
- Good onboarding workflows
- Mobile app included

**Lattice** ($79-299/user/month)
- Performance management focus
- Goal tracking
- Real-time feedback

**Zenefits** ($8-16/employee/month)
- HR + benefits administration
- Payroll integration
- Compliance management

**Workable** ($99-599/month)
- Recruitment-focused
- Solid core HRIS
- Scalable pricing

**Freshteam** ($30-80/user/month)
- Recruitment + onboarding
- Talent management
- Good value for SMBs

## Very Budget/Free Options

**Wave Payroll** (Free)
- Basic payroll only
- No full HRIS features
- Good for freelancers/small teams

**Paychex Flex** (Pricing varies)
- Payroll + HR basics
- Per-payroll-run costs
- Good support

**Deel** (Free + premium)
- Global teams/contractors
- Time tracking
- Expense management

## Selection Tips

- **Employee count matters**: Some charge per user (expensive at scale)
- **Feature focus**: Payroll-only vs. full HRIS varies significantly
- **Integration needs**: Check if they connect with your tools
- **Compliance requirements**: Varies by location

**What matters most for your needs?** (size, location, specific features)
